opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am literally tearing my skin off. I haven't slept in two days, and every joint on my body is raw, weeping, and burning.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A full-body flare of unbearable itch and weeping skin, no sleep for two days.

symptom_narrative.onset: worsening over 72 hours after a cold and dry winter weather
symptom_narrative.character: intense itch, red scaly weeping patches in the skin creases
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inner elbows, behind the knees, neck and wrists
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: weeping in the creases, thickened skin on the wrists; no fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: lifelong sensitive itchy skin and atopy (asthma, hay fever)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lifelong sensitive itchy dry skin, asthma and hay fever (atopy)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: central heating running high; dry winter; recent cold

communication_style.typical_message_style: exhausted, distressed, focused on the itch and sleep

objective_data_offered.value: dry skin all over with red scaly weepy patches in the elbow creases, behind the knees, neck and wrists; scratched raw, some tiny blisters; thickened skin on the wrists
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot closely inspect for punched-out erosions or honey crust
